title: dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. pinnatifidus
intro: Dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. pinnatifidus, also known as Chinese glaucous perilla or Chinese prickly ash, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea. Dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. pinnatifidus is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
